contracts.name: Pop-Up Venue Launch
contracts.description: Scout a prime location and launch a pop-up venue to expand your music empire.

contracts.name: Corporate Sponsorship Deal
contracts.description: Land a massive corporate sponsorship for a pop act, earning a fortune in cash and prestige.

contracts.name: Producer Security Detail
contracts.description: Protect a sought-after producer from rival headhunters, earning their studio time and loyalty.

contracts.name: A&R Talent Scout
contracts.description: Scout talent at open mic nights, picking up street cred, insider intel, and a new contract.

contracts.name: Record Label Empire
contracts.description: Found your own pop label. Each future pop release adds to your growing reputation.
contracts.ongoing_benefit_description: +2 VP each time you complete a Pop quest

contracts.name: Venue Investment Fund
contracts.description: Build an investment network in the venue market, reaping returns on every new property.
contracts.ongoing_benefit_description: +4 VP each time you purchase a building

contracts.name: Session Musician Poach
contracts.description: Raid a rival's session musician pool, walking away with their entire bass section.

contracts.name: Charity Gala Showcase
contracts.description: Host a star-studded charity gala that rockets your reputation — but a rival basks in the press.

contracts.name: Lottery Venue Prize
contracts.description: Win a mystery venue in an industry charity raffle — you never know what you'll get.

contracts.name: Payola Pipeline
contracts.description: Grease the right palms at radio stations so every payday brings fresh bass talent to your door.
contracts.ongoing_benefit_description: When you gain coins from a board action, also gain 1 bass player

contracts.name: VIP Industry Gala
contracts.description: Infiltrate the most exclusive industry events, gaining massive fame and insider intelligence.

contracts.name: Grammy Night Showcase
contracts.description: Pour everything into a career-defining Grammy performance with full production and backing band.

contracts.name: Rock Loyalty Program
contracts.description: Build fierce loyalty among your guitarists — every new recruit inspires another to join.
contracts.ongoing_benefit_description: When you gain a guitarist from a board action, gain 1 extra guitarist

contracts.name: Rock Union Takeover
contracts.description: Crush a rival rock collective's uprising, cementing your dominance in the genre.
contracts.ongoing_benefit_description: +2 VP each time you complete a Rock quest

contracts.name: Ambush at the Arena
contracts.description: Hijack a rival's arena slot with a surprise guerrilla set, cashing in on their audience.

contracts.name: Raid the Rival Studio
contracts.description: Storm a competitor's studio during downtime and walk out with their cash reserves.

contracts.name: Crush the Underground Revolt
contracts.description: Put down an upstart band threatening your territory, recruiting their best guitarist in the process.

contracts.name: Deliver an Ultimatum
contracts.description: Confront a rival promoter with a final offer — accept the terms or face a hostile takeover.

contracts.name: Reunion Tour Penance
contracts.description: Force a feuding rock band back together for one last tour, reuniting estranged musicians.

contracts.name: Repel the Critics
contracts.description: Silence your harshest critics with an undeniable sold-out show that proves the haters wrong.

contracts.name: Hire a Tour Manager
contracts.description: Recruit a legendary tour manager who runs your operation so well, you gain an extra worker permanently.
contracts.ongoing_benefit_description: Gain 1 extra permanent worker for the rest of the game

contracts.name: Stadium Rock Revival
contracts.description: Rally a massive roster of musicians for a landmark stadium recording session.

contracts.name: Confront the Kingpin
contracts.description: Take on the most powerful figure in the industry with your full band and crew backing you up.

contracts.name: Rock Army Mobilization
contracts.description: Assemble the largest rock army the city has ever seen for an unprecedented multi-stage festival.

contracts.name: Convert a Classical Musician
contracts.description: Win over a classical musician to the soul sound, and pick a new quest from the inspiration.

contracts.name: Discover Hidden Soul Venue
contracts.description: Uncover a legendary secret soul venue and claim a quest from its storied archives.

contracts.name: Gospel Alliance
contracts.description: Form a powerful alliance with a gospel choir, unlocking new creative opportunities.

contracts.name: Miracle at the Microphone
contracts.description: A transcendent vocal performance lets you convert any musician into a singer.
contracts.ongoing_benefit_description: When you gain a singer from a board action, you may trade any 1 resource you own for 1 additional singer

contracts.name: Protect the Soul Legacy
contracts.description: Guard the soul music heritage — each future soul project adds to your legacy.
contracts.ongoing_benefit_description: +2 VP each time you complete a Soul quest

contracts.name: Eliminate the Rival Revue
contracts.description: Take down a competing revue show with a superior lineup of musicians and cash.

contracts.name: Soul Music Residency
contracts.description: Secure a permanent soul residency that attracts one new musician every round.
contracts.ongoing_benefit_description: Gain 1 random non-coin resource at the start of each round

contracts.name: Rehabilitate Burned-Out Artists
contracts.description: Use soul therapy to rehabilitate burned-out musicians, transforming them into a guitarist army.

contracts.name: Soul Revival Festival
contracts.description: Host a massive soul revival that draws devoted singers from across the country.

contracts.name: Soul Train Anniversary Special
contracts.description: Produce the definitive soul television special, cementing your legacy forever.

contracts.name: Church of Soul Music
contracts.description: Build a cathedral dedicated to soul music history, requiring a devoted choir of singers.

contracts.name: Donate Instruments to Charity
contracts.description: Donate instruments to a music school in need, earning the devotion of grateful new singers.

contracts.name: Time Warp Remix
contracts.description: Master the art of temporal remixing, gaining the ability to recall your already-placed workers.
contracts.ongoing_benefit_description: Once per round, recall one of your already-placed workers back to your pool

contracts.name: Explore the Groove Archive
contracts.description: Dig through legendary funk archives — every guitarist discovery yields insider intel.
contracts.ongoing_benefit_description: When you gain a guitarist from a board action, also draw 1 intrigue card

contracts.name: Tame the Wild Sessions
contracts.description: Wrangle chaotic jam sessions into tight funk recordings with a mix of singers and drummers.

contracts.name: Study the Funk Masters
contracts.description: Study the masters' techniques — each future funk project reflects your growing expertise.
contracts.ongoing_benefit_description: +2 VP each time you complete a Funk quest

contracts.name: Recover the Master Tapes
contracts.description: Find legendary lost master tapes, granting access to studios others are using.
contracts.ongoing_benefit_description: Once per round, use a building action space occupied by another player's worker

contracts.name: Steal the Secret Arrangements
contracts.description: Swipe a rival's secret horn arrangements and cash in on their studio work.

contracts.name: Retrieve Vintage Instruments
contracts.description: Track down priceless vintage instruments from estate sales and pawn shops.

contracts.name: Investigate the Underground
contracts.description: Probe the underground funk scene, gaining massive street cred and insider intel.

contracts.name: Funk Academy Recruitment
contracts.description: Recruit a squad of drummers for an elite funk training academy.

contracts.name: Mothership Connection Tour
contracts.description: Launch an epic interstellar funk tour, exposing the cosmic truth to massive audiences.

contracts.name: Interstellar Funk Odyssey
contracts.description: Journey to the furthest reaches of experimental funk, requiring a massive drum section.

contracts.name: Funk Boot Camp
contracts.description: Put raw recruits through an intense funk boot camp, drilling the groove until they emerge battle-tested.

contracts.name: Expose Industry Corruption
contracts.description: Blow the whistle on a corrupt promoter, gaining loyal singers who respect your integrity.

contracts.name: Fence Bootleg Recordings
contracts.description: Sell bootleg recordings underground — every new bass player connection pays cash dividends.
contracts.ongoing_benefit_description: When you gain a bass player from a board action, also gain 2 coins

contracts.name: Plant a Mole at Rival Label
contracts.description: Install a spy at a competing label — each future jazz success deepens your intel network.
contracts.ongoing_benefit_description: +2 VP each time you complete a Jazz quest

contracts.name: Establish a Speakeasy Network
contracts.description: Set up hidden speakeasy venues across the city — your existing properties multiply your influence.
contracts.ongoing_benefit_description: +2 VP per building you already own at the time of completion

contracts.name: Procure Rare Pressings
contracts.description: Acquire rare vinyl pressings from questionable sources at a premium.

contracts.name: Underground Reputation
contracts.description: Build street cred in the underground jazz scene through shadowy deals and late-night sessions.

contracts.name: Sleeper Agent at the Label
contracts.description: Plant a deep-cover agent at a rival label — each intrigue card played expands your spy network.
contracts.ongoing_benefit_description: +2 VP each time you play an intrigue card

contracts.name: Rob the Jazz Aristocrats
contracts.description: Plunder the old-guard jazz establishment's vault, walking away with their cash and prestige.

contracts.name: Hostile Label Takeover
contracts.description: Execute a hostile takeover of a rival jazz label, absorbing their entire bass player roster.

contracts.name: Jailhouse Jazz Session
contracts.description: Stage a legendary jailhouse jam that recruits guitarists and lets you play your best intrigue card.

contracts.name: Jazz Underground Raid
contracts.description: Lead a daring raid on the underground jazz circuit, hauling away cash and fame.

contracts.name: Shadow Jazz Syndicate
contracts.description: Build a vast underground jazz syndicate with an army of bass players and deep connections.
